ideation: This sequence depicts a robot deep in thought, using its arms to subtly express contemplation.  The animation starts with the robot's arms at its sides, then moves to a position of hands resting on the chin, followed by arms gently raised, and finally a return to a relaxed position. The subtle movements reflect the internal process of thinking.  The right arm will remain largely still to provide contrast and balance.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, quiet contemplation begins
left hand rises to the chin, right arm stays put
arms gently lift and fall, lost in thought
both arms return to a relaxed, resting state
